briefdescription.para: Algorithms set this if this when something isn't yet implemented.

detaileddescription.para: Algorithms set this when the calculation doesn't make sense for those object types. This result can be based on object parameters, but not on their relative location.

briefdescription.para: Can't be computed because of how the objects are located relative to each other.
The result was not finite. This is set automatically if you return non-finite values, but you can also set this manually.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from class MR::Features::Primitives::Plane. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Can have infinite length in one or two directions. The top and/or bottom can be flat or pointy. Doubles as a cylinder, line (finite or infinite), and a circle.
